description_long: This house features a sprawling single-story layout with multiple interconnected rooms and a spacious, open floor plan. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front entryway is defined by a central walkway flanked by manicured lawns and several mature trees, leading up to a modest porch area. The roof is primarily flat with some sections featuring subtle elevation changes, and there is a visible sunroom or enclosed patio on one side. The landscaping includes a mix of grass and paved surfaces, providing both greenery and functional outdoor space. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern ranch-style home, emphasizing horizontal lines and a strong connection to the surrounding yard.
description: A single-story, modern ranch-style house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and landscaped front yard with mature trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above the front, highlighting the main entryway, central walkway, and the arrangement of trees and lawn in front.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the right side, revealing the sunroom/enclosed patio and the depth of the backyard area.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, showcasing the back patio, large windows, and the full width of the structure.
description_view_3: View 3 captures the left side of the house, emphasizing the driveway, side lawn, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Central walkway with steps leading to a modest porch, flanked by trees and lawn, featuring a simple door and minimal decorative elements.
